title: 01509_Neural_Continuous-Discrete_State_Space_Models_for_Irregularly-Sampled_Time_Series
positive_examples: Improved imputation and forecasting performance of NCDSSM over existing models, which can enhance predictive accuracy in various domains such as climate and biological systems.
NCDSSM enables accurate modeling of high-dimensional time series, which can benefit sectors like healthcare and environmental monitoring by providing better data insights.
